turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. Maine kal UPI se payment ki thi. Amount deduct hua mera account se but receipt nahi mili.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Aapka naam aur approximate payment amount?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Geeta Mankar. 1,200 rupaye. Patient ID SNC-P-77001 hai.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ek second... haan, payment received ho gayi hai hamare system mein kal dopahar ko. Receipt process mein delay ho gayi lagta hai. Main abhi aapke registered number pe resend karta hoon.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: SMS pe aayegi ya email pe?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Dono pe jaayegi — SMS aur email dono pe. 5 minute mein aa jaani chahiye. Kuch aur?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Nahi, bas receipt chahiye thi. Shukriya.
